chunks.text: H I G H C O U R T O F S I N D H A T K A R A C H I Misc. Appeal No.199 of 2024 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Appellant: Haji Muhammad Jan s/o Haji Abdul Qadir, through Ms. Saira Shaikh Advocate Respondent: Noorani Hosiery through its proprietors / partners / owners namely Zia Mahmood, Jawad Zia, Fahad Zia, Basit Ali, and Majid Zia, through Mr. Waqar Alam Abbasi, Advocate Date of hearing: 18.09.2025 Date of Order: 02.12.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to follow, the above- titled misc. appeal is allowed, and the Order dated 19.11.2024 passed by the Intellectual Property (“IP”) Tribunal, Karachi, in Suit No.53/2024 is set aside. The matter is remanded to the IP Tribunal for decision/adjudication on merits, allowing the parties to present/defend their claims, record evidence, and hearing final arguments. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
